chunks.title: Hezekiah's Illness and Healing Promise
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Hezekiah's sickness, Isaiah's oracle, and the sign of the shadow moving back.

chunks.title: Hezekiah's Song of Thanksgiving
chunks.reason: A poetic composition by Hezekiah recounting his near-death experience and gratitude for deliverance.

chunks.title: The Fig Cake and Final Sign
chunks.reason: Brief exchange between Isaiah and Hezekiah regarding the healing method and a final question about ascending to the temple.
